channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-17359] conf-sanity: 'test_32d failed with 1'
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for paf <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/54786b9d-a716-40b6-93b3-f315edb91590

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/100770 - 4.18.0-477.21.1.el8_8.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/100770 - 4.18.0-477.21.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

Unloading modules on trevis-34vm6: Attempt 0
CMD: trevis-34vm6 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin:/usr/share/Modules/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config TESTLOG_PREFIX=/autotest/autotest-2/2023-12-12/lustre-reviews_review-dne-part-3_100770_5_4608e8a6-b104-4276-b548-c2204290157d//conf-sanity TESTNAME=test_32d bash rpc.sh /usr/sbin/lustre_rmmod ldiskfs
trevis-34vm6: trevis-34vm6.trevis.whamcloud.com: executing /usr/sbin/lustre_rmmod ldiskfs
CMD: trevis-34vm6 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin:/usr/share/Modules/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config TESTLOG_PREFIX=/autotest/autotest-2/2023-12-12/lustre-reviews_review-dne-part-3_100770_5_4608e8a6-b104-4276-b548-c2204290157d//conf-sanity TESTNAME=test_32d bash rpc.sh check_mem_leak
trevis-34vm6: trevis-34vm6.trevis.whamcloud.com: executing check_mem_leak
CMD: trevis-34vm6 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin:/usr/share/Modules/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config TESTLOG_PREFIX=/autotest/autotest-2/2023-12-12/lustre-reviews_review-dne-part-3_100770_5_4608e8a6-b104-4276-b548-c2204290157d//conf-sanity TESTNAME=test_32d bash rpc.sh load_modules
trevis-34vm6: trevis-34vm6.trevis.whamcloud.com: executing load_modules
trevis-34vm6: Loading modules from /usr/lib64/lustre
trevis-34vm6: detected 2 online CPUs by sysfs
trevis-34vm6: Force libcfs to create 2 CPU partitions
trevis-34vm6: ../lnet/lnet/lnet options: 'accept=all'
CMD: trevis-34vm6 tunefs.lustre --dryrun /tmp/t32/mdt
checking for existing Lustre data: found

Read previous values:
Target: t32fs-MDT0000
Index: 0
Lustre FS: t32fs
Mount type: ldiskfs
Flags: 0x5
(MDT MGS )
Persistent mount opts: user_xattr,errors=remount-ro
Parameters: sys.timeout=20 lov.stripesize=1048576 lov.stripecount=0 mdt.identity_upcall=/home/zam/work/git/lustre-wc-rel/lustre/tests/../utils/l_getidentity

Permanent disk data:
Target: t32fs-MDT0000
Index: 0
Lustre FS: t32fs
Mount type: ldiskfs
Flags: 0x5
(MDT MGS )
Persistent mount opts: user_xattr,errors=remount-ro
Parameters: sys.timeout=20 lov.stripesize=1048576 lov.stripecount=0 mdt.identity_upcall=/home/zam/work/git/lustre-wc-rel/lustre/tests/../utils/l_getidentity

exiting before disk write.
CMD: trevis-34vm6 mount -t lustre -o loop,exclude=t32fs-OST0000 /tmp/t32/mdt /tmp/t32/mnt/mdt
== cleanup with rc=0 ==
CMD: trevis-34vm6 umount -d /tmp/t32/mnt/mdt
CMD: trevis-34vm6 rm -rf /tmp/t32
conf-sanity test_32d: @@@@@@ FAIL: test_32d failed with 1
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6687:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7027:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7083:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6913:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/conf-sanity.sh:2940:main()
Dumping lctl log to /autotest/autotest-2/2023-12-12/lustre-reviews_review-dne-part-3_100770_5_4608e8a6-b104-4276-b548-c2204290157d//conf-sanity.test_32d.*.1702400887.log
CMD: trevis-34vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-34vm2,trevis-34vm3,trevis-34vm6,trevis-34vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-2/2023-12-12/lustre-reviews_review-dne-part-3_100770_5_4608e8a6-b104-4276-b548-c2204290157d//conf-sanity.test_32d.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1702400887.log;
dmesg > /autotest/autotest-2/2023-12-12/lustre-reviews_review-dne-part-3_100770_5_4608e8a6-b104-4276-b548-c2204290157d//conf-sanity.test_32d.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1702400887.log

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
6 records found on master branch in the past 2 weeks.

trevis-80vm6: trevis-80vm6.trevis.whamcloud.com: executing losetup -a
CMD: trevis-80vm6 mount -t lustre -o loop,exclude=t32fs-OST0000 /tmp/t32/mdt /tmp/t32/mnt/mdt
trevis-80vm6: mount.lustre: mount /dev/loop0 at /tmp/t32/mnt/mdt failed: Device or resource busy
trevis-80vm6: Is the backend filesystem mounted?
trevis-80vm6:  Check /etc/mtab and /proc/mounts
pdsh@trevis-80vm1: trevis-80vm6: ssh exited with exit code 16
CMD: trevis-80vm6 losetup -a
 conf-sanity test_32d: @@@@@@ FAIL: Mounting the MDT
